div.div:
Rapid Qualification (< 2 hours)
• Do we use the component?
• Are we exposed?
• Is a patch available?

div.div:
EMERGENCY DEPLOYMENT
• Create hotfix branch
• Run smoke tests (minimum)
• Canary deployment (if possible)
• Full rollout < 48 hours

Verification & Monitoring
• Confirm patch applied to all systems
• Monitor for deployment issues
• Alert on failures
